MaxLineLength:AnalyticsHomeScreen.kt$InsightCard("I001", "Unusual Travel Spend", "Aisha Khan's travel spend is 2.3Ă— above the team average this month.", InsightType.ANOMALY)
MaxLineLength:AnalyticsHomeScreen.kt$InsightCard("I002", "SLA Breach Risk", "3 claims have been pending approval for over 5 days â€” expected SLA breach by Friday.", InsightType.BREACH_RISK)
MaxLineLength:AnalyticsHomeScreen.kt$InsightCard("I003", "Submission Pattern", "Mileage submissions spike every Monday. Consider scheduling batch review reminders.", InsightType.PATTERN)
MaxLineLength:AnalyticsHomeScreen.kt$InsightCard("I004", "Savings Identified", "Policy-compliant hotel selections saved â‚ą4,200 this quarter compared to category average.", InsightType.SAVINGS)

MaxLineLength:AnalyticsHomeScreen.kt$Text("â‚ą%,.0f".format(TEAM_TOTAL), style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary)
MaxLineLength:AnalyticsHomeScreen.kt$Text("â‚ą%,.0f".format(data.totalSpend), style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = Color.White)

MaxLineLength:AskAdvanceFormScreen.kt$"I hereby declare that the advance requested is for official purposes only, and I will submit proper receipts and expense claims within 7 working days of the expenditure."

MaxLineLength:AskAdvanceFormScreen.kt$Text("No documents required for amounts below â‚ą25,000 (illustrative)", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, textAlign = TextAlign.Center)
MaxLineLength:CardDetailScreen.kt$Text("For demo purposes, the PIN is not shown.", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
MaxLineLength:CardDetailScreen.kt$Text("â‚ą%,.2f".format(card.balanceRupees), style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary)
MaxLineLength:CardRequestScreen.kt$"Processing time: 5â€“7 business days after verification. A physical card will be couriered to your registered address."

MaxLineLength:DelegationScreen.kt$SectionHeader(icon = Icons.Default.Group, title = "Delegated To Me", subtitle = "You're covering for these people")
MaxLineLength:DelegationScreen.kt$SectionHeader(icon = Icons.Default.PersonAddAlt, title = "My Delegations", subtitle = "People you've authorised to act for you")
MaxLineLength:DelegationScreen.kt$Text("Delegation", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = Color.White)
MaxLineLength:DelegationScreen.kt$Text("Manage who acts on your behalf", style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall, color = Color.White.copy(alpha = 0.8f))

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("Can I change the app theme?", "Yes. Go to Profile â†’ Settings â†’ Appearance. Choose Light, Dark, or System Default. The theme is persisted in DataStore.", "Account & Settings")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("Can I save frequent routes?", "Frequent routes are listed in the Log Miles start screen. Tap a route to prefill the form. Add new routes via the + button.", "Log Miles")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("Can I switch between accounts?", "Yes â€” go to Profile and tap your name to switch between saved demo accounts. Each account maintains its own journey history.", "Getting Started")
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("Does tracking work offline?", "Yes. All GPS data is stored locally in Room. You can track with no network; the data persists across app restarts.", "Track Miles")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("How do I export my data?", "On any journey's Hardware Events screen, tap the download icon to export events as CSV or JSON. The share sheet lets you send it via email or Drive.", "Account & Settings")
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("How do I log miles manually?", "Go to the Log tab, enter start/end locations and the distance, select your vehicle, and submit. No GPS needed.", "Log Miles")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("How do I pause and resume tracking?", "Tap the pause button in the floating bubble or on the Live Tracking screen. The timer stops, but your route is preserved. Tap Resume to continue.", "Track Miles")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("How do I start my first tracking session?", "Open the Track tab, tap 'Start Journey', grant location permission if prompted, and drive. Tap the floating bubble to pause or stop.", "Getting Started")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("How do I submit a mileage expense?", "After tracking or logging a journey, tap 'Submit' on the track detail screen, fill in the submission form, and tap 'Submit Claim'.", "Expenses & Approvals")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("How do approvals work?", "Submitted expenses appear in your manager's Approvals queue. They can approve, reject, or seek clarification. Status updates appear in your Saved Tracks list.", "Expenses & Approvals")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("How do vouchers work?", "Go to an approved journey â†’ Create Voucher. Select multiple submitted expenses, give the voucher a title, and submit. Vouchers are stored locally in this demo.", "Expenses & Approvals")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("What does a policy violation mean?", "A violation is flagged when a journey exceeds the reimbursement cap, uses a disallowed vehicle, or the GPS data quality is poor (e.g., mock location detected).", "Expenses & Approvals")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("What happens to draft journeys?", "Drafts appear in Saved Tracks with a Draft badge. You can submit or discard them. The Auto-Discard toggle in Demo Settings discards active journeys at 22:00.", "Track Miles")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("What is multi-account mode?", "Demo Settings â†’ Account Switcher lets you switch between demo personas with different journey histories, policies, and approval chains.", "Account & Settings")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("What is the Odometer feature?", "On the Submission screen, tap the camera button to photograph your vehicle's odometer. OCR reads the value and calculates distance as a cross-check.", "Track Miles")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("What permissions does Mileway need?", "Location (Fine + Background) for continuous GPS tracking. Notification permission on Android 13+ for the tracking notification. Camera for odometer photo capture.", "Getting Started")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("Where can I find the setup guide?", "Tap 'Setup Guide' in the Quick Links section at the bottom of this screen or visit Settings â†’ Demo Settings for interactive feature flags.", "Getting Started")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("Why is GPS accuracy low?", "Ensure Location is set to Fine (not Coarse), background access is allowed, and Battery Optimisation is off for this app. The GPS Drift Simulation toggle in Demo Settings adds artificial noise.", "Track Miles")

MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Faq("Why is my distance rejected?", "Policy limits check the entered distance against the straight-line distance between locations. Large deviations flag a policy violation.", "Log Miles")
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$Text("Need more help?", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold)
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$onClick = { scope.launch { snackbarHostState.showSnackbar("Bug report submitted â€” thank you!") } }
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$onClick = { scope.launch { snackbarHostState.showSnackbar("Email sent to support@mileway.app") } }
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$private val CATEGORIES = listOf("Getting Started", "Track Miles", "Log Miles", "Expenses & Approvals", "Account & Settings")

MaxLineLength:NotificationCentreScreen.kt$NotifItem("N001", "Approval Required", "Priya Sharma's mileage claim needs your review", "2 min ago", true, NotifCategory.APPROVALS, Icons.Filled.Approval, Color(0xFF6366F1))

MaxLineLength:NotificationCentreScreen.kt$NotifItem("N002", "Advance Approved", "Your advance ADV-001 of â‚ą8,000 was approved", "1 hr ago", true, NotifCategory.ALL, Icons.Filled.Receipt, Color(0xFF10B981))
MaxLineLength:NotificationCentreScreen.kt$NotifItem("N003", "Expense Rejected", "EXP-003 rejected â€” receipt unclear", "3 hrs ago", true, NotifCategory.ALL, Icons.Filled.MoneyOff, Color(0xFFEF4444))

MaxLineLength:NotificationCentreScreen.kt$NotifItem("N004", "Policy Alert", "3 claims exceed the â‚ą10/km daily cap this week", "Yesterday", true, NotifCategory.ALL, Icons.Filled.Policy, Color(0xFFF59E0B))
MaxLineLength:NotificationCentreScreen.kt$NotifItem("N005", "Card Blocked", "CARD-002 was blocked at your request", "Yesterday", false, NotifCategory.ALL, Icons.Filled.CreditCard, Color(0xFF6B7280))
MaxLineLength:NotificationCentreScreen.kt$NotifItem("N006", "Payables Update", "PO-2024-002 approved by finance", "2 days ago", false, NotifCategory.ALL, Icons.Filled.Receipt, Color(0xFF3B82F6))

MaxLineLength:NotificationCentreScreen.kt$NotifItem("N007", "App Update", "Version 2.4.1 available â€” improved GPS accuracy", "3 days ago", false, NotifCategory.SYSTEM, Icons.Filled.SystemUpdate, Color(0xFF8B5CF6))
MaxLineLength:NotificationCentreScreen.kt$NotifItem("N008", "System", "Scheduled maintenance: Sun 02:00â€“04:00 IST", "4 days ago", false, NotifCategory.SYSTEM, Icons.Filled.Info, Color(0xFF6B7280))

MaxLineLength:NotificationData.kt$NotificationData$NotificationRecord("N005", "Card Blocked", "CARD-002 was blocked at your request", "Yesterday", isUnread = false, NotifType.CARD)
MaxLineLength:NotificationData.kt$NotificationData$NotificationRecord("N006", "Payables Update", "PO-2024-002 approved by finance", "2 days ago", isUnread = false, NotifType.PAYABLES)

MaxLineLength:NotificationData.kt$NotificationData$NotificationRecord("N008", "System", "Scheduled maintenance: Sun 02:00â€“04:00 IST", "4 days ago", isUnread = false, NotifType.SYSTEM)
MaxLineLength:NotificationData.kt$NotificationData$val system: List<NotificationRecord> get() = all.filter { it.type == NotifType.SYSTEM || it.type == NotifType.APP_UPDATE }
